zh.Romford, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可洛福德
zh.Romford, Essex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭艾可洛福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lunsford I於1369年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭素可時，他的父親John de Lunsford30歲，母親Agnes de Rochele21歲。他於1419年與Elizabeth Echingham在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年5月3日在英國素可艾欽加姆享年82歲。

zh-hans.Romford, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可洛福德
zh-hans.Romford, Essex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰艾可洛福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Lunsford I于1369年1月9日出生在英国英格兰素可时，他的父亲John de Lunsford30岁，母亲Agnes de Rochele21岁。他于1419年与Elizabeth Echingham在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年5月3日在英国素可艾欽加姆享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lunsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lundsford in East Sussex, so named from an Old English personal name Lundrǣd + Old English ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lunsford I was born on 9 January 1369, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Lunsford, was 30 and his mother, Agnes de Rochele, was 21. He married Elizabeth Echingham in 1419, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 May 1451, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lunsford I est né le 9 janvier 1369, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Lunsford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Rochele, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Echingham en 1419, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1451, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lunsford I am 9. Januar 1369 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Lunsford 30 und seine Mutter Agnes de Rochele 21. Er hat 1419 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Echingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1451 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Etchingham, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lunsford I è nato il il 9 gennaio 1369 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Lunsford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Rochele, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Echingham nel 1419, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 maggio 1451, nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Lunsford Iが1369年1月9日にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父John de Lunsfordは30歳，母Agnes de Rocheleは21歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリススセックスでElizabeth Echinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年5月3日にイギリススセックスエトチンガムで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lunsford I(이)가 1369년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Lunsford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Rochele(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Elizabeth Echingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 5월 3일 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 January 1369–3 May 1451: 9 de janeiro de 1369–3 de maio de 1451
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lunsford I nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1369, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Lunsford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Rochele, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Echingham em 1419, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1451, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Lunsford I родился 9 января 1369 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Lunsford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Rochele, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Echingham в 1419 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 мая 1451 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.9 January 1369–3 May 1451: 9 de enero de 1369–3 de mayo de 1451
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Lunsford I nació el 9 de enero de 1369, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Lunsford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes de Rochele, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Echingham en 1419, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1451, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
